positive: Minimalist bohemian forest creature portrait, featuring a graceful, stylized fox leaping through swirling ethereal mist and bioluminescent foliage. The fox has elegant, clean silhouette lines and deep autumnal colors against a bright, contrasting background of neon teal and violet light. Composition should be centered and highly detailed, resembling a sophisticated woodcut illustration adapted for screen printing. Use strong, clean outlines, high contrast, and a magical, dreamy mood. --ar 1:1 --s 750
